rationale: The citing paper references Lewis (2004) only in the introductory CRM literature review as one example of prior work on loyalty programs affecting customer outcomes. It appears in a grouped parenthetical citation alongside other studies and is not discussed for specific findings, mechanisms, measures, or methods. The stockout model, estimation approach, and simulations in the paper do not build directly on this cited article. This indicates a background positioning citation rather than a distinct functional dependency.
